topic: Prepositions Part 2 — Direction & Movement (To, From, Into, Onto, Through, Across, Along)

options: I am going home from the office.
The water was poured into the bottle.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं स्कूल जा रहा हूँ।" = "I am going to school."
Full sentence: "He came from Delhi."

questions.sentence: The cat went into the room yesterday.
options: The cat went into the room yesterday.
The cat went into the room.
questions.answer: The cat went into the room.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The cat went into the room."
Correct translation: "वह टेबल पर चढ़ गया।" = "He climbed onto the table."
Full sentence: "We passed through the forest."

questions.sentence: He went across the road yesterday.
options: He went across the road yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He went across the road."

options: I am going from Mumbai to Delhi.
I am going home from the office.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "हम नदी के किनारे-किनारे चले।" = "We walked along the river."

questions.sentence: I am going _____ from the office.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I am going home from the office."

questions.sentence: He jumped into the water yesterday.
options: He jumped into the water yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He jumped into the water."

options: The air is coming through the window.
The children climbed onto the bus.
questions.answer: The children climbed onto the bus.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "बच्चे बस में चढ़ गए।" = "The children climbed onto the bus."
Full sentence: "We came through the tunnel."

questions.sentence: She went across the bridge yesterday.
options: She went across the bridge yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She went across the bridge."

options: This train goes from Delhi to Mumbai.
I am going from Mumbai to Delhi.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "हम समुद्र किनारे चले।" = "We walked along the beach."

questions.sentence: I am going _____ Mumbai to Delhi.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I am going from Mumbai to Delhi."

questions.sentence: The water were poured into the bottle.
options: The water were poured into the bottle.
The water was poured into the bottle.
questions.answer: The water was poured into the bottle.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The water was poured into the bottle."

options: The cat went into the room.
The children climbed onto the bus.
The air is coming through the window.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह छत पर चढ़ गया।" = "He climbed onto the roof."

questions.sentence: The air is _____ through the window.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "The air is coming through the window."

questions.sentence: We went across the field yesterday.
options: We went across the field yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We went across the field."

options: This train goes from Delhi to Mumbai.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "हम रास्ते के किनारे चले।" = "We walked along the path."

questions.sentence: This train goes _____ Delhi to Mumbai.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "This train goes from Delhi to Mumbai."
